items.name: Builders Club
items.description:
Clean, sharp, and full of builder heritage — the White & Black Outrageous Builders Club Hard Hat brings vintage BC era flair with a crisp twist. With its clean white shell contrasted by bold black accents and the iconic oversized visor, it’s perfect for retro avatars, throwback construction roleplay, and collectors chasing golden-era Roblox gear.

⚙️ More Retro Builder Hats:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=hard+hat&Category=11&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

items.name: Scowling Dynamic | READ DESC.
items.description:
Instructions on how to use this head in R15 :
- Via Catalog Avatar Creator, unequip 'Default Mood' to remove unwanted blinking/emoting while idle.
- Be sure to save it under an avatar to avoid repeating this process.
- 'Default Mood' will impact facial animations each time it is equipped.
- This issue does not exist within R6. :)  
-------------------------------------
